title: Classic Massage
description: A 60-hour basic course in classic massage, with 15 hours of theory and 45 hours of practice, taught by therapeutic massage specialists in Kraków. It is the foundation for the soft tissue work I do now.
detail: "Bio-Relax" · 60 didactic hours (15 theory, 45 practical) · Kraków, 26.03.2021 · Certificate No. 18/KLAS/Kr/21
